title: Phyllonoma laticuspis
taxonomy: Phyllonoma laticuspis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllonomaceae, which is a family of epiphytic plants. This family is part of the order Aquifoliales, a group of flowering plants that are closely related to the order Cornales. Phyllonoma laticuspis is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Phyllonoma laticuspis is primarily based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants in the family Phyllonomaceae. Further research and analysis may be needed to confirm the classification of this species.
